profile.name: Ecclesiates Natarios Sihombing
profile.headline: CS Student & HIMTI Activist
about: I am a Computer Science student at BINUS University specializing in Software Engineering.
I work as a HIMTI Responsi Activist, helping fellow students learn programming, data structures, and algorithms.

research.narrative: I am interested in clean code design, efficient data structures, and building robust backend services like Discord bots.

focus.description: Teaching and applying fundamental data structures and algorithms.
